name: Irish Sweet Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup chopped citron or candied lemon rind
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking soda.
3. Cream together the shortening, sugar, and molasses. Beat in the egg.
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients and sour milk; stir in the fruit.
5. Pour the batter into two greased 8 x 4 x 2 1/2-inch loaf pans.
6. Bake for 75 minutes.
